title: Snowflake Ribbon - 10yd x 2.5 Inch Winter White Snowflake Ribbon with Burrs for Christmas Tree Decor & Gift Wrapping
features: Product Size: The size of the ribbon is 10yd x 2.5 inch/9mx6.35cm and can be cut to any suitable length. (The ribbon is cut by hand, there may be wire cutting points at the ribbon, please be careful to avoid hurting yourself)

Beautiful Design: Our ribbons are designed in natural colors with single printed snowflakes and white burrs on the edges, delicate and festive, suitable for Christmas, winter and New Year decorations.

Premium Material: The Christmas ribbons are made of premium polyester and equipped with wire edges, which are tear-resistant and not easy to fade, and you can easily bend them into the shape you want.

Suitable for: Our snowflake ribbons are perfect for winter, Christmas and New Year craft decorations, flower bow crafts, gift wrapping, wreath decorations, farmhouse decorations, stairs, DIY, Christmas tree bows, gift baskets and more to enhance the holiday atmosphere.
Wide Application: These Christmas tree ribbons can be used to make crafts and enjoy DIY fun, and can also be used to wrap gifts or decorate Christmas parties.
description: Specification: Color: off white Material: polyester Product Size: 10yd x 2.5 inch/9mx6.35cm Package details: 1 x snowflake ribbon Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
